operationMessages.text: Repository does not contain construction kit model '{modelId}'.
CkAttributeId '{ckAttributeId}' of CkTypeId '{ckTypeId}' does not exist. Please check if you have set dependency to the correct construction kit model.
Derived CkTypeId '{derivedCkTypeId}' of CkTypeId '{ckTypeId}' does not exist. Please check if you have set dependency to the correct construction kit model.
CkTypeId '{ckTypeId}' defines unknown association role '{roleId}'. Please check if you have set dependency to the correct construction kit model.
CkTypeId '{ckTypeId}' defines unknown association role target CkTypeId '{targetCkTypeId}'. Please check if you have set dependency to the correct construction kit model.
CkAttributeId '{ckAttributeId}' is not unique.
CkAssociationRoleId '{ckAssociationId}' is not unique.
CkTypeId '{ckTypeId}' is not unique.
CkTypeId '{ckTypeId}' has no inheritance definition. Ensure that attribute ckDerivedId is set.
CkModelId '{modelId}' has defined a dependency to '{dependentModelId}' that results to a circular dependencies.
CkTypeId '{ckTypeId}' is unknown for inheritance. This may happen because a dependency to another construction kit model is missing.
CkTypeId '{ckTypeId}' defines AttributeId '{ckAttributeId}' that violates at derived CkTypeId '{derivedCkTypeId}' the unique attribute id constraint.
CkTypeId '{ckTypeId}' defines attribute names '{attributeNames}' by inheritance that violates the unique attribute name constraint.
CkTypeId '{ckTypeId}' defines AssociationRoleId '{ckAssociationId}' to CkTypeId '{targetCkTypeId}' that violates the unique association constraint
CkTypeId '{ckTypeId}' defines attribute names '{attributeName}' that violates the unique attribute name constraint.
CkTypeId '{ckTypeId}' defines AttributeId(s) '{ckAttributeId}' that violates the unique attribute id constraint.
CkTypeId '{ckTypeId}' defines an outgoing AssociationRoleId '{ckAssociationId}' to CkTypeId '{targetCkTypeId}' by inheritance that violates the unique association role id constraint
CkTypeId '{originCkTypeId}' defines a unknown target CkTypeId '{targetCkTypeId}' for role id '{roleId}'. This may happen because a dependency to another construction kit model is missing.
CkTypeId '{ckTypeId}' is unknown. This may happen because a dependency to another construction kit model is missing.

CkTypeId '{ckTypeId}' defines an outgoing AssociationRoleId '{ckAssociationId}' to CkTypeId '{targetCkTypeId}'. This association is also defined between CkTypeId '{otherCkTypeId}' and target CkTypeId '{otherTargetCkTypeId}'.
CkTypeId '{baseCkTypeId}' is final, but CkTypeId '{derivedTypeId}' is derived from it.
Directory must be empty.
CkModelId '{modelId}' contains invalid characters. Allowed characters are A-Z, a-z, 0-9, . and _.
CkTypeId '{ckTypeId}' contains invalid characters. Allowed characters are A-Z, a-z, 0-9, . and _.
CkAttributeId '{ckAttributeId}' contains invalid characters. Allowed characters are A-Z, a-z, 0-9, . and _.
CkAssociationId '{ckAssociationId}' contains invalid characters. Allowed characters are A-Z, a-z, 0-9, . and _.
Schema validation failed at '{path}'->'{errorMessage}'
Directory does not exist.
File does not exist.
CkEnumId '{ckEnumId}' has defined key '{key}' which is used several times.
CkAttributeId '{ckAttributeId}' is defined as Record, but the ValueCkRecordId is missing.
CkRecordId '{ckRecordId}' contains invalid characters. Allowed characters are A-Z, a-z, 0-9, . and _.
RecordId '{ckRecordId}' is not unique.
CkRecordId '{ckRecordId}' is unknown. This may happen because a dependency to another construction kit model is missing.
CkRecordId '{ckRecordId}' is unknown for inheritance. This may happen because a dependency to another construction kit model is missing.
CkRecordId '{baseCkRecordId}' is final, but CkRecordId '{derivedCkRecordId}' is derived from it.
CkRecordId '{ckRecordId}' defines attribute name '{attributeName}' that violates the unique attribute name constraint.
CkRecordId '{ckRecordId}' defines AttributeId '{ckAttributeId}' that violates at derived CkRecordId '{derivedCkRecordId}' the unique attribute id constraint.
CkRecordId '{ckRecordId}' defines AttributeIds '{ckAttributeId}' that violates the unique attribute id constraint.
CkRecordId '{ckRecordId}' defines attribute name '{attributeNames}' by inheritance that violates the unique attribute name constraint.
CkAttributeId '{ckAttributeId}' uses unknown CkRecordId '{ckRecordId}'. This may happen because a dependency to another construction kit model is missing.
Attribute Id '{ckAttributeId}' of CkRecordId '{ckRecordId}' does not exist. Please check if you have set dependency to the correct construction kit model.
Derived CkRecordId '{derivedCkRecordId}' of CkRecordId '{ckRecordId}' does not exist. Please check if you have set dependency to the correct construction kit model.
CkEnumId '{ckEnumId}' contains invalid characters. Allowed characters are A-Z, a-z, 0-9, . and _.
CkEnumId '{ckEnumId}' is not unique.
CkAttributeId '{ckAttributeId}' is defined as Enum, but the ValueCkEnumId is missing.
CkTypeId '{originCkTypeId}' defines for role id '{roleId}' an unknown target AttributeId '{targetCkAttributeId}' for CkType '{targetCkTypeId}'.
CkTypeId '{ckTypeId}' defines AssociationRoleId '{ckAssociationId}' that is unknown. This may happen because a dependency to another construction kit model is missing.
CkAssociationRole '{ckAssociationRole}' defines attribute name '{attributeName}' that violates the unique attribute name constraint.
CkAssociationRole '{ckAssociationRole}' defines AttributeIds '{ckAttributeId}' that violates the unique attribute id constraint.
CkAttributeId '{ckAttributeId}' defined at type '{ckTypeId}' not found.
CkAttributeId '{ckAttributeId}' defined at record '{ckRecordId}' not found.
File does not contain a model. It will be ignored.
No imports founds in construction kit model configuration file.
Enum '{ckEnumId}' is not extensible but contains an extension.
